title: [App] Flamingo - Connect headset already paired with charge case
scenario: Connect a headset that is already paired with the charge case but not with the app, then pair it with the app and verify battery indicators and software update info.
expected: 1. Headset appears properly, two battery indicators are visible on home screen (headset and case).\n2. Update all button is present (if DFU available), info about headset and charge case is displayed.
